strategy: Equitable Recovery and Housing Protection Program
critical_function: reduces long-term harm through fair recovery renter protection repair support and anti-displacement safeguards

strategy: Ecosystem-Based Flood and Fire Risk Reduction
critical_function: uses wetlands forests floodplains soils and watersheds as living risk-reduction infrastructure
